title: Malty Crunchy Indulgent Tunisian Prawns Fried-Rice
description: A unique fusion of flavors and textures, combining the crunch of fried shallots and malty notes of honey with the indulgence of prawns and rich eggs.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add the prawns and cook until pink and just cooked through, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove the prawns from the pan and set aside.
In the same pan, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the paprika and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cooked rice to the pan and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add the cooked prawns back into the pan and stir-fry for another minute.
Make wells in the rice mixture and pour in the beaten eggs.
Sprinkle the fried shallots over the top of the eggs.
Cook until the eggs are just set, about 1-2 minutes.
Transfer the mixture to a serving platter and drizzle with honey.
